ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "crash_number" INTEGER /* Crash number as assigned by the reporting agency */,
  "crash_date" TEXT /* Date of the crash */,
  "crash_time" TEXT /* Time of the crash */,
  "city_town" TEXT /* City or town where the crash occurred */,
  "crash_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the crash (e.g., non-fatal injury, property damage) */,
  "roadway" TEXT /* Roadway where the incident occurred */,
  "near_intersection" TEXT /* Roadway of the nearest intersection */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Landmark near the crash site */,
  "police_agency" TEXT /* Police agency responding to the incident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the crash */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the crash */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions at the time of the crash */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the incident */,
  "injury_count" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the incident */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geospatial latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geospatial longitude coordinate */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the roadway where the incident occurred */,
  "alcohol_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether alcohol was involved in the incident */,
  "drug_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether drugs were involved in the incident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* The individual or agency that reported the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* The status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "investigation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_city_town FOREIGN KEY ("city_town") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_roadway FOREIGN KEY ("roadway") REFERENCES roadways ("roadway_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_police_agency FOREIGN KEY ("police_agency") REFERENCES police_agencies ("agency_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_crash_severity FOREIGN KEY ("crash_severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_description")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city/town */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or town */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city/town */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "number_of_traffic_lights" INTEGER /* Number of traffic lights in the city */,
  "number_of_stop_signs" INTEGER /* Number of stop signs in the city */,
  "average_traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Average daily traffic volume in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for severity level */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roadways" (
  "roadway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roadway */,
  "roadway_name" TEXT /* Name of the roadway */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of roadway (e.g., highway, street) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the roadway in miles */,
  "number_of_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the roadway */,
  "traffic_flow_direction" TEXT /* Traffic flow direction (e.g., one-way, two-way) */,
  "average_daily_traffic" INTEGER /* Average daily traffic volume on the roadway */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the roadway */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the roadway */,
  "construction_status" INTEGER /* Whether the roadway is under construction */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roadway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the police agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., local, state) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agency */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Geographic area the agency has jurisdiction over */,
  "number_of_officers" INTEGER /* Number of officers in the agency */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the agency */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Type of equipment the agency uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)
